title: Everything Hates You.
description: All Mobs Try To Kill You
body:
![How it works:  All mobs within a 500 Block Radius HATE YOU  They run at you and try to kill you First time i tried this mod i died to a SALMON. This is the hardest mob i've ever played might be the scariest non-horror mod i've also ever played lol  ALSO this mod isn't configurable yet, But some minor tweaks and changes are coming soon.!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dce98069273c97eddc61837959e7b64bc79dd444_0.webp)

![Tutorial New Update](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bb2bd63cd388cfbb2469366bfb49de78660a15fc.png)

How it works:

All mobs within a 500 Block Radius
HATE YOU

They run at you and try to kill you
First time i tried this mod
i died to a SALMON. This is the
hardest mob i've ever played
might be the scariest non-horror
mod i've also ever played lol

ALSO this mod isn't configurable
yet, But some minor tweaks and
changes are coming soon.!

PROS: 

1. food comes to you:

  yeah cows and other mobs are extremely dangerous BUT they walk to you and if you have a sword or a weapon, you can slaughter them, free food! (kinda)

2. very fun and HARD challenge:

   i have NEVER expierenced a challenge harder than this other than like better than wolves. plus i had a great time beta testing this mod

CONS:

1. Bee's Are Annoying
2. Parrot's Are Annoying
3. Creeper's Are Horrifying
4. Salmon's Are Terrifying
5. Dolphins Are Pettrifying
6. Don't Visit Villages Or Ocean Temples.
